item.name: Megaloambystoma Horn
item.description: Moist to the touch, this horn produces a carefree sound that brings your megaloambystoma floating to your side.

mount.name: Megaloambystoma
mount.action: Summon forth your megaloambystoma. Or should that be <Emphasis>max</Emphasis>olotl? You decide.
mount.description: The fact that this impossibly large ambystoma is fitted with an elaborate saddle strongly suggests it was created to be ridden. However, its presence in Pandæmonium means it was flawed in some way and deemed a failure.
mount.tooltip:
It has been an age shhhince we
have feashhhted on axolotl.
- Seww
